Rebuild the rolling-CV predictions table from run directories

Source: R/run_rolling_cv.R
compile_rolling_cv_predictions.Rd

Regenerates predictions.parquet from the per-cutoff run_MOSAIC directories under a run_rolling_cv() artifact (e.g. after adding a cutoff or to add quantile columns), without recalibrating.

Usage

compile_rolling_cv_predictions(
  dir_output,
  base_config = MOSAIC::config_default,
  models = NULL,
  n_reps_best_medoid = NULL,
  central_method = NULL,
  write = TRUE
)

Arguments

dir_output

A run_rolling_cv() output directory (must contain manifest.json and runs/).

base_config

Config used to recover the held-out (unmasked) observed series (default MOSAIC::config_default); must match the run config.

models

Character vector of model types to compile (e.g. "ensemble", "opt", "best", "medoid"); NULL (default) uses the set recorded in each run's manifest.

n_reps_best_medoid

Integer or NULL (default); number of stochastic LASER replicates to draw for the single-config best/medoid models. NULL reuses the value stored in the run manifest.

central_method

Central tendency for pred_central: NULL (default) reuses the value recorded in the run manifest (or "mean" for older manifests); otherwise a scalar or per-channel c(cases=, deaths=) override.

write

Logical; write predictions.parquet (default TRUE).

Value

The compiled long predictions data frame (invisibly if written).

On this page

Developed by John R Giles, Christopher W Lorton.
